record.candidate_surface: later continuation dependence on the combined history of one attributable shared pool
record.comparator_surface: the matched single-source, shuffled-history, contributor-removal, or controller-exclusion response
record.denominator_definition: maximum absolute magnitude of the paired reference and comparator responses, bounded below by measurement_resolution
record.numerator_definition: combined-pool-history response minus its matched comparator response

delta.rationale: Frozen from candidate-blind matched-null margins and declared measurement resolution

record.zero_denominator_policy: Use measurement_resolution as the denominator floor and record resolution_limited when both paired response magnitudes remain at that floor
